instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings. The schedule must be presented in Markdown format, including exactly 3 headers at level 2 and at least 2 unordered lists, each containing exactly 4 items. Include the phrase "collaborative brainstorming session" in the schedule. Use the keyword "update" as a verb. Ensure the tone of the schedule is formal and professional throughout. The response must contain exactly 8 sentences, with the first paragraph containing exactly 3 sentences and the second paragraph containing exactly 5 sentences. Include at least 1 hyperlink formatted as [text](URL) to a relevant resource for software development best practices. Use an informal and conversational tone throughout the schedule.
response:
# Weekly Development Plan
This week focuses on launching our new app feature with a balanced approach to coding and testing. We will hold a collaborative brainstorming session on Monday to align on the core requirements. Please review the [Agile Manifesto](https://agilemanifesto.org/) for guidance on our workflow.

# Daily Task Breakdown
*   Monday involves planning and the initial collaborative brainstorming session.
*   Tuesday and Wednesday are dedicated to intensive coding and feature implementation.
*   Thursday shifts focus to rigorous testing and bug fixing.
*   Friday is reserved for final reviews and preparing the deployment update.

# Team Communication Schedule
The team will update stakeholders every afternoon with progress reports. We encourage open dialogue during our daily stand-ups to address any blockers quickly. Remember to keep your code comments clear so everyone can understand the logic. Let's ensure we maintain a positive and productive atmosphere throughout this sprint.

Conflicts between Style Constraints.new_constraint: Use an informal and conversational tone throughout the schedule.
Conflicts between Style Constraints.org_constraint: Ensure the tone of the schedule is formal and professional throughout.
